REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON JUN-24-2002 IN DEPT. 306 - PLAINTIFF & DEF. STIP. TO ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AS FOLLOWS: PLTF SHALL HAVE POSS'N OF PREMISES @ 310 COLUMBUS AVE., #124, SF, CA, WHICH SHALL BE STAYED 'TIL 7/3/02 @ 9AM; DEF. SHALL PAY $950 ATTY FEES & COSTS & $1,099 IN BACK RENT (FROM 4/29/02 - 7/3/02); BOTH SIDES AGREE TO MUTUAL RELEASES; DEF. STATES NO OTHER PERSON HAS ANY RIGHTS TO PREMISES. BOTH SIDES STIPULATE THAT IF DEF. VACATES THE PREMISES ON OR BEFORE 7/3/02 @ 9AM, THEN NO JUDGMENT SHALL BE ENTERED AGAINST DEF. AND HE SHALL OWE NOTHING.

STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED; THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, DILIP M RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DURES, EDWARD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 310 COLUMBUS AVENUE, #124, SF, CA 94133 $2,049.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,049.00, STAYED UNTIL JUL-03-2002, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
